paragraphs.text:
%md

This worksheet is usefull for proving Q1 consistant.
A DataFrame of a CollectedProductArgNode pattern and results is defined.
A pivot by dimension transform then creates rows of expected pattern vaules.

msg.data:
This worksheet is usefull for proving Q1 consistant.
A DataFrame of a CollectedProductArgNode pattern and results is defined.
A pivot by dimension transform then creates rows of expected pattern vaules.

paragraphs.title: Object QuerryS3T querrys DFScripts.s3T for CollectedProductArgNode pattern (MaxN,range of N, range of Dimension).   For each MaxN,N,Dimension method s3TQuerry consumes ResultSets of case class s3T reducing defining rows to an evaluate (evaluates a row poly).  case class rResult arguments a DataFrame representing QuerryS3T output.

paragraphs.title: The pivot by dimension of S12 DataFrame into pivot DataFrame
paragraphs.text:
import org.apache.spark.sql.DataFrame
import org.apache.spark.sql.types.DecimalType
val df= z.get("s12DF").asInstanceOf[DataFrame]
val groupDf = df.withColumn("rowResultBD",col("rowResult").cast(DecimalType(25,0)))
                .withColumn("nBD",col("n").cast(DecimalType(25,0)))
                .withColumn("rowCounterBD",col("rowCounter").cast(DecimalType(25,0)))
                .withColumn("dimBD",col("dim").cast(DecimalType(25,0)))
                .orderBy(asc("nBD"),asc("rowCounterBD"))
                .groupBy("nBD","rowCounterBD")
                .pivot("dimBD")
                .agg(sum("rowResultBD"))
val groupDfCount = groupDf.count()
groupDf.show(groupDfCount.toInt,false)
z.put("pivotDF",groupDf)
